channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: VP Sara Commissioned Painting Inspired by Davao Artist, Dispute on Original Gift Arises
item.description: The camp of Ramil Madriaga clarified that Vice President Sara Duterte requested a painting inspired by the original work of Davao-based artist Tanya Gaisano Lee. The dispute arose after Lee denied tha...

item.title: UK government plans to avoid food and CO2 shortages amid Iran conflict disruptions
item.description: The UK government has started planning for potential supply chain disruptions linked to the ongoing war involving Iran, which has led to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical shipping route....

item.title: Punjab Assembly Praises PM Shehbaz and CDF Munir for Role in Promoting Peace in the Middle East
item.description: On Thursday, the Punjab Assembly approved a unanimous resolution urging the Nobel Peace Prize for Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) Field Marshal Asim Munir. The resoluti...

item.title: Federal Court of Appeal Rules on JNF Canada Charitable Status Dispute
item.description: The Federal Court of Appeal’s recent ruling in the Jewish National Fund of Canada (JNF Canada) case marks a significant development in ensuring accountability within Canada's charitable oversight syst...

item.title: Worker found alive after 16 days in Mardan mine collapse as probe launched into incident
item.description: In a remarkable development, a man was rescued alive 16 days after being trapped under debris following a marble mine collapse in Rustam tehsil of Mardan district, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. According to Res...

item.title: Qatar welcomes PM Shehbaz with ceremonial fighter jet escort showcasing strong bilateral ties
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif received a ceremonial escort by Qatari Air Force fighter jets upon entering Qatari airspace on his way to Doha, symbolising the strengthening of diplomatic relations betw...

item.title: Device Uses Ultrasound to Stimulate Olfactory Bulb and Create Smells
item.description: A team of independent researchers has developed a device capable of producing the sensation of various smells without the use of chemical cartridges. The device works by directing focused ultrasound t...

item.title: One Australian claims the $40 million Powerball jackpot
item.description: The recent Powerball draw #1561 has produced a life-changing result for one lucky Australian, who won the full $40 million jackpot on Thursday night. The winning numbers were 27, 13, 15, 19, 14, 3, an...

item.title: Development Bank of Nigeria partners BADEA to enhance long-term funding for small businesses
item.description: The Development Bank of Nigeria (DBN) don secure €40 million credit line from the Arab Bank for Economic Development in Africa (BADEA) to boost financial support for micro, small and medium enterprise...

item.title: Andy Barr maintains fundraising edge in competitive Kentucky Senate Republican primary
item.description: U.S. Representative Andy Barr has preserved a significant financial advantage over his Republican rivals in the race to replace retiring Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell in Kentucky, according t...

item.title: Supreme Court confirms legality of preventive detention of actor Ranya Rao and associate under gold smuggling charges
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has upheld the preventive detention of Kannada film actor Harshavardhini Ranya Rao and her associate Sahil Jain in an alleged gold smuggling case. The detention was ordered ...

item.title: South Africa Must Strengthen Material Sovereignty Amid Global Power Shifts
item.description: Faiez Jacobs argues that the ongoing US-Israel-Iran conflict is more than a distant Middle Eastern crisis; it is a demonstration of how global power operates through control over energy, trade routes,...

item.title: Commonwealth mission concludes Tanzania visit after talks to advance democratic governance
item.description: The Special Envoy of the Commonwealth Secretary-General and former President of Malawi, Lazarus McCarthy Chakwera, has ended his nine-day official visit to Tanzania on April 16, 2026. His departure th...

item.title: Abel Mutua’s daughter reflects on cost of upbringing after financial literacy lesson
item.description: The daughter of Kenyan filmmaker Abel Mutua, Stephanie Mumbus, has sparked conversation online after sharing her reaction to a financial literacy assignment from school. According to a video shared by...

item.title: KUCCPS Clarifies 2025 University Placement Cut-off Points Ahead of Deadline
item.description: The Kenya University and Colleges Central Placement Service (KUCCPS) has issued clarification regarding the ongoing placement process for the 2026/2027 cohort. The application portal for degree and TV...

item.title: Authorities act against unhygienic poultry waste dumping in Stanger
item.description: An illegal fertiliser operation in Stanger has resulted in a severe odour and fly infestation, causing significant discomfort to local residents. According to Aresh Singh, chairman of NGS Odour and En...

item.title: Sudan’s Long War: Causes, Players, and Humanitarian Fallout
item.description: The war in Sudan has entered its fourth year as of April 15, 2026, marking one of the worst humanitarian crises globally. The conflict pits the Sudanese army led by General Abdel Fattah al-Burhan agai...

item.title: Julius Malema handed five-year jail term for 2018 rally firearm incident
item.description: South African opposition leader Julius Malema, aged 45 and founder of the Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) party, was sentenced to five years in prison by a magistrate's court in KuGompo City, formerly...

item.title: Turkiye mourns after school shooting claims lives of children and teacher
item.description: In southern Turkiye, the nation is grappling with shock and grief following a tragic school shooting that claimed the lives of eight children aged 10 and 11, along with their teacher. The attack was c...

item.title: Asian Bishops Urge Dialogue and Peace in Middle East Crisis
item.description: Cardinal Pablo Virgilio David, together with other Asian bishops from the Federation of Asian Bishops’ Conferences (FABC), is calling for an end to hostilities in the Middle East. The bishops stressed...
